description: Wire Fraud Prevention — validates wire instructions, detects domain mismatches, enforces callback verification, and flags suspicious patterns before any funds are disbursed.

hard_stops.label: Wire Instruction Change Hold
hard_stops.logic: Any change to wire instructions triggers automatic hold and requires human authorization before proceeding.

hard_stops.label: Domain Mismatch Hold
hard_stops.logic: Email domain on wire instructions does not match known party domain — hold for manual verification.

hard_stops.label: No Callback Phone Block
hard_stops.logic: No callback phone number on file — block wire processing until callback number is provided.

hard_stops.label: Callback Not Confirmed Block Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: Callback to verified phone number has not been confirmed — block disbursement.

soft_flags.label: New Bank Institution
soft_flags.logic: Wire instructions reference a bank institution not previously seen for this party — flag for enhanced review.

soft_flags.label: International Wire
soft_flags.logic: Wire is routed internationally — flag for OFAC screening and additional compliance checks.

soft_flags.label: Rush Request
soft_flags.logic: Party has requested expedited wire processing — flag for heightened scrutiny.
